name: Seafood Gumbo
recipeInstructions:
1. Make seafood stock from shrimp heads and shells, crab bodies, fish carcasses or all of the above. Substitute ham hocks, chicken backs, or necks if needed. Simmer for several hours until strained.
2. Cook okra in oil in a large, heavy pot over medium heat, stirring frequently until some sliminess is gone (about 15 minutes).
3. Add tomatoes, onions, celery, garlic, peppers, vinegar, salt, cayenne pepper, white pepper, black pepper, bay leaves, thyme, basil, and oregano to the pot. Cook over low to medium heat for about half an hour.
4. Blend in the dark roux until fully incorporated into the mixture.
5. Slowly blend in the seafood stock, simmersing for about one hour.
6. Add crab and shrimp, then simmer for 10-15 minutes more.
7. Add oysters and simmer for an additional five minutes.
8. Serve over rice with file powder added to taste at the table (file powder should not be cooked).
